description: Raw line and continuum intensity dataset repacked from the irregular toy raw HDF5 grid.

provenance.generator: custom Korg spectrum synthesis with a MARCS atmosphere grid
provenance.star_ordering: Rows are grouped by raw star in natural filename order. Within each star, rows follow the raw mu_points ordering from the HDF5 file.
provenance.intensity_subsampling: Kept 4 raw intensity rows per star using deterministic pseudorandom selection with base seed 1729; selected indices are sorted to preserve mu ordering.

checks: final parameter block matches raw last star
final intensity_lines block matches raw last star
final intensity_continuum block matches raw last star
shared wavelength arrays match raw wavelength grids

physical_units.note: Raw intensities use the Korg intensity convention.

parameters.npy.description: Per-ray parameters aligned row-by-row with intensity_lines.npy and intensity_continuum.npy.

intensity_lines.npy.description: Raw line intensities on the shared line wavelength grid.

intensity_continuum.npy.description: Raw continuum intensities on the shared continuum wavelength grid.
